## Security and Privacy

- [ ] No secrets, tokens, service-role keys, or real credentials are committed.
- [ ] Authorization and RLS behavior were reviewed where applicable.
- [ ] No raw child image/audio persistence was introduced.
- [ ] Child-facing AI or child data handling was reviewed where applicable.
- [ ] New environment variables are documented without values.

## Final Checklist

- [ ] Branch is updated with latest `main`.
- [ ] Scope is focused.
- [ ] No debug logs or temporary test files are included.
- [ ] Documentation is updated where needed.
- [ ] No unapproved remote database mutations were made.
- [ ] Reviewer instructions or known limitations are included.
